Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

U

unequip(Player, EquipmentSlot) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Removes the currently equipped item from the specified equipment slot.
unequip(EquipmentSlot) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Unequips an item from the specified slot and returns it to the inventory.
update(String) - Methode in Klasse view.utils.ArrowPanel
Updates the arrow image and toggles the selection state.
updateDisplay() - Methode in Klasse view.battle.EnemyPanel
Updates the visual display of the enemy.
updatePlayerHealth() - Methode in Klasse view.gamewindow.GameWindow
Updates the health bar to match the player's current health value.
updatePlayerHealth(int) - Methode in Klasse view.battle.BattleMenuPanel
Updates the player's health bar display.
updatePlayerHealth(int) - Methode in Klasse view.battle.BattleView
Updates the player's health display in the battle menu.
updateStats(Player) - Methode in Klasse view.pausemenu.StatsPanel
Updates the displayed statistics based on the given player.
updateView(Player) - Methode in Klasse view.gamewindow.DungeonPanel
Updates the rendered dungeon view based on the player's new state.
use(Entity) - Methode in Klasse model.items.Consumable
Uses this consumable on the specified entity, applying its effect.
